reviews.comment:
No tiene habilitado el shop para comer ni comprar nada hace mas de 6 meses. No permiten pagar con la app ypf si pedis Factura A

(Translated by Google)
The shop has been closed for over 6 months for food and purchases. They don't allow payments with the YPF app if you request an invoice (Factura A).

reviews.comment:
Llegue muy tarde y noa fuimos a dencasar, no pude ver mucho, los baños grandes y re limpios, gracias

(Translated by Google)
I arrived very late and we went home, I couldn't see much, the bathrooms were large and very clean, thank you

reviews.comment:
Servi compras,  cerrado, atienden en un sucucho, q no tiene nada !!!!!!!!y todo carisimo !!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Servi Compras is closed; they serve customers in a tiny, cramped place that has absolutely nothing! And everything is ridiculously expensive!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkeWJFWnRSRmwzWDNCR1YxTmxWVXR5YkU5NlFXYxAB

reviews.comment:
El ser socio del ACA te brinda mucho beneficios aún más siendo viajero frecuente !!! Muchas veces por qué soy jubilado no me alcanza para camping y pido permiso para hacer noche la gente super amable

(Translated by Google)
Being an ACA member offers many benefits, even more so if you're a frequent traveler! Often, because I'm retired, I can't afford camping and I have to ask permission to stay overnight; the people are incredibly kind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkV2FXTjJOUzExU1dVd1pHUlpRMms1YlZFdE1tYxAB

reviews.comment:
Una de las peores atenciones que recibí en mi vida en una estación de servicio YPF. No vuelvo a parar en mi vida, más teniendo una Shell al lado.

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst experiences I've ever had at a YPF gas station. I'm never stopping there again, especially with a Shell station right next door.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aeVlsZENaVWhGVm5WUmMzQmhZbDlwTTAxclVYYxAB
